title: Mark Zuckerberg launches an AI-optimism campaign, and a jab at the doomers
summary: Zuckerberg’s counter is relentless positivity. “22 years and 3.5 billion people later, we’re doubling down,” the ad says. “The future is for everyone.” A source confirmed to Axios that it forms part of a broader paid and earned media campaign.
caption: output/2026-07-23/mark-zuckerberg-launches-an-ai-optimism-campaign-and-a-jab-at-the-doom.txt
